heading: Your design files aren't stranded
lead: Finished work in **Figma, Penpot, Illustrator, InDesign or any SVG app** doesn't have to stay locked in one app. Open **Layout Studio**, click **Import a design**, and the file opens as a living layout — not a flattened picture. Every layer becomes an editable box, ready to keep working on, mix with tools, and render through the same rules.

flow.title: Your design file
flow.desc: Figma, Penpot, Illustrator, InDesign or any SVG

flow.title: Editable canvas
flow.desc: Every layer a box you can retype, restyle and move

flow.title: Mix in tools
flow.desc: Drop in a QR code, a live chart or another render

flow.title: Render anywhere
flow.desc: SVG, PDF, PNG, video — reproducible from a URL

points.title: It stays editable
points.desc: Text stays text, shapes stay shapes, images join your library. You keep working on the design — you never repaint a screenshot.

points.title: It arrives conformed
points.desc: Fonts remap to your faces and every fill passes the same colour guard as a native box. A foreign artboard lands already governed.

points.title: It becomes a template
points.desc: Save it and the layout is a reusable, URL-addressable tool — one anyone with Lolly can open, refill and render. No design app required.

cta: See how importing a design works →
